info.title: opalc
info.description: OPAL compiler CLI - Convert C# to OPAL and compile OPAL to C#

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: OPAL Compiler - Compiles OPAL source to C# and migrates between languages

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Convert a single file between C# and OPAL

arguments.name: input
arguments.description: The source file to convert (.cs or .opal)

commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Migrate an entire project between C# and OPAL

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: The project directory or .csproj file to migrate

commands.name: benchmark
commands.description: Compare OPAL vs C# across 7 evaluation categories

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize the current directory for OPAL development with AI coding agents

commands.name: format
commands.description: Format OPAL source files to canonical style

arguments.name: files
arguments.description: The OPAL source file(s) to format

commands.name: diagnose
commands.description: Output machine-readable diagnostics for OPAL files

arguments.name: files
arguments.description: The OPAL source file(s) to diagnose

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze C# files for OPAL migration potential

commands.name: hook
commands.description: AI agent hook commands for OPAL-first enforcement

commands.name: validate-write
commands.description: Validate a Write tool call to enforce OPAL-first development

arguments.name: tool-input
arguments.description: The JSON tool input from the AI agent
